title: Wyoming Patience
content: You know, I learned patience standing waist-deep in Wyoming streams, fly-fishing. The fish don't care how important you think you are. You read the water, present your offering, and wait. The best things in life reward patience.
ssml_content: You know, I learned patience standing waist-deep in Wyoming streams, fly-fishing. <break time="200ms"/>The fish don't care how important you think you are. You read the water, present your offering, and wait. The best things in life reward patience.
